title: Discover Your Customer
theme: Customer Discovery Canvas + FEC guided start

learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Your dreams deserve a plan — next is your customer
learn.summary: Week 1 started with YOU. Week 2 captures real customer evidence, then maps your first FEC building blocks.
bullets: Interview real people — capture problems before solutions
Complete your Customer Discovery Canvas individually
FEC progress: YOU (Week 1) → Customer (this week) → full canvas (Week 3)
Bring your future-self letter and one dream photo from Week 1
learn.callout: Read before class. Your coach connects your Dream Board to the people you will serve.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Customer discovery lab
workshop.summary: Interview conversations, then complete your Customer Discovery Canvas with what you heard.
bullets: Share one Dream Board insight and who it points you toward serving
List top problems, choose the most common, describe your ideal customer
workshop.callout: Save your worksheet after interviews — then mark Workshop complete.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: FEC guided start — your first three building blocks
assignment.summary: Complete only Customer Segment, Customer Problem, and Value Proposition in the guided wizard. The rest of the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas stays locked until Week 3 — keeping cognitive load low while you focus on real customer needs.
bullets: Customer Segment — Who do I want to serve?
Customer Problem — What important problem do they face?
Value Proposition — How will I help solve that problem?
assignment.callout: Use your Customer Discovery Canvas as input. You are not filling the full FEC yet — that unlocks in Week 3.

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What did you learn about your market?
prompts: Who surprised you as a potential client?
What problem feels most urgent to solve?
How does this customer connect to the life you want to build?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 2 complete
submit.summary: Unlock Week 3 — the rest of your Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas.
bullets: Ready to continue the canvas in Week 3
